text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 241 

SPLMTL_DSB_LCKIN 

LABEL: Beneficiary Lock-In Record in Supplemental Disability File 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there is a record in the disability and need supplemental file for this person that 
includes data on lock-in status. 

SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_DSB_LCKIN 

LONG NAME: SPLMTL_DSB_LCKIN 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE:
